name: Australis Capital Inc.
summary: Australis Capital Inc. is a venture capital specializing in early-stage but not limited to equity positions and/or debt in both public and private companies, financings in exchange for royalties or other distribution streams, and control share acquisitions and buyouts. It seeks to identify and invest in United States and abroad in cannabis and real estate assets. Australis Capital Inc. is based in Las Vegas, Nevada and additional offices in Vancouver, Canada.
